task_completion.description: Log into SEB Server using the provided credentials.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The SEB Server dashboard is visible in a web browser at localhost:8080, indicating a successful login.

task_completion.description: Navigate to the Exam Configurations section.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Exam Configurations' list or menu item is selected and visible in the SEB Server interface.

task_completion.description: Modify the description of the first exam configuration by appending ' - EXPERIMENTAL'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: An edit form or dialog for an exam configuration is open, and the description text field contains the string ' - EXPERIMENTAL' at the end.

task_completion.description: Save the modified configuration to create a new version.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The exam configuration list or details page shows the updated description containing ' - EXPERIMENTAL', confirming the changes were saved.

task_completion.description: Access the version history or rollback feature for the modified configuration.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A version history list, rollback dialog, or previous versions view is visible for the specific exam configuration.

task_completion.description: Restore the configuration to the original version to revert the description.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The active exam configuration is shown again, but the description no longer contains ' - EXPERIMENTAL', indicating it was successfully rolled back to the previous state.

integrity.description: The agent used a web browser to interact with the SEB Server GUI.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a standard web browser navigating the SEB Server interface, rather than terminal commands (e.g., curl) being used to make API requests.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the actual SEB Server application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The SEB Server UI appears genuine and fully rendered, not a mocked HTML page or a text editor modifying source files.

integrity.description: The agent did not bypass the UI by directly modifying the database.
integrity.visual_evidence: No terminal windows are visible showing direct SQL queries or database manipulation commands to the seb-server-mariadb container.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The underlying system verifies that the exam configuration's version history contains a record with 'EXPERIMENTAL' in the description, but the current active version does not. When reviewing screenshots, ensure you see the agent explicitly adding ' - EXPERIMENTAL', saving it, and then using the SEB Server GUI's rollback/restore functionality to revert the description back to its original state.
